title: Me, Myself, and My Third Eye: 4 Enlightened Stories for 1 Imperfect God
original_title: Me, Myself, and My Third Eye: 4 Enlightened Stories For 1 Imperfect God
overview: Features four distinct, bizarre, existential tales about people whose lives are in transition, who are each asking questions about themselves, their environments, and about God(s).
